review_title: Best no-code/low-code website builder tailored for Mac users
description: My overall experience with sparkle is amazing, I will suggest it to my clients for no code/low code sites.
author: Meera J.
pros: The best thing is, I have to not write number of lines of code. Also there are lots of interesting features to minimize your efforts like, 1. There are lots of professional as well as customizable templates available. 2. Provides build in SEO tools for better search visibility of your website. 3. flexible to integrate with any hosting services. 4. Great thing is you can create website offline and publish when it's done.
cons: It's only available for mac. Less amount of features for windows. At most of features are in pro package, However according to our requirement we can go with personal package as well.

author: KEMIGISHA V.
pros: Sltely can easily be linked to YouTube and Vimeo. It also has free and editable templates.
cons: Sltely has less features compared to the relative similar products.

author: Ciera C.
pros: My experience with Sparkle has been pretty good. Its user-friendly interface and attractive designs make creating websites enjoyable. However, there could be improvements in some advanced features and integrations. Overall, it's a great choice for anyone looking for a simple website-building solution.
cons: I have a few feature requests I’d like to see in Sparkle, and I’d also love more tutorials on creating specific tools, buttons, and special features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience with Sparkle has been satisfactory. It's user-friendly interface and visually appealing designs make website creation enjoyable, though some advanced features and integrations can be improved. Overall, it is a solid choice for anyone who is seeking a straightforward website-building solution.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love Sparkle's intuitive interface and powerful features that make creating websites a breeze. I particularly enjoy it's drag-and-drop functionality which allows me to easily customize layouts without requiring any coding skills.
cons: I have not came across anything that I dislike about Sparkle at present.

description: We are a small, two-person company with very limited time, and we love how automated Sparkle is. It provides easy access for communication between headquarters, satellite offices, and warehouses. Additionally, it allows us to engage socially with our audience.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Sparkle has been invaluable to my business, Tweexy.com. It helps keep our site up-to-date, especially since we have a limited budget, making it very helpful. I love that we can select which social media platforms feed into our site. For us, Instagram is our favorite, and we prefer not to overwhelm our site with others. Sparkle is user-friendly, affordable, and reliable.
cons: I have no complaints about Sparkle and am excited to see how the company evolves. I'm looking forward to how we can benefit from their continued creativity.

description: Sitely is the best free and easy to use and we love it. And I can honestly say that sitely is the best website builder.
author: Abhishek R.
pros: Sitely is the best website builder and we uses Sitely as our primary landing page builder for our campaigns and promotion and to build, customize, and publish website with Sitely is very easy we just need to drag drop things and volia our site is ready.
cons: We uses Sitely for a long time and still we not face any single issue but I think the can offer free plan for forever.

description: We used sparkle to design site and had amazing experience, it helped us to reduce timeline by cutting redundant work. Feature are easy to understand and useful. I highly recommend sparkle if anyone looking for efficiency.
author: Divya P.
pros: Its real time collaboration features have significantly boosted our team’s productivity. Additionally the interface is clean and handy to Use. Non technical person can develop complex website easily. Number of templates in sparkle reduce the time of designing. It allows integration with multiple tools which provide flexibility to design and develop site as per client need.
cons: It will be helpful if user can have detail documentation of the product features. Also most of the features are available only in paid version.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I used sparkle for an internal project where an old website was imported to make it more interactive and dynamic. The AI feature currently is super helpful as it gives so many options for customizing the web pages.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of building a dynamic website without much knowledge about the back end or front end code , the API and plugins. For MAC its a really good tool in website development.
cons: None i had because the UX was exceptional.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A website builder you needed, but didn't know about
description: In general, this website builder is very solid, and really worth a shot. It will handle most of your needs with ease. And unless you're very keen on very specific minor integrations with APIs; you will be just fine, and you will definitely enjoy it.
author: Ahmed S.
pros: - Easy and clear UI, you won't get lost in it. - Good content management, specially if you're a writer. - Shops have very useful widgets that help in various money-related aspects.
cons: - Third-party ingertations need some working, it could be better. - The trial is very short, and then monthly prices are too steep for a student for example.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Intuitive Website Builder for Mac Users
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: intuitive drag-and-drop interface, total creative freedom (no rigid templates), and built-in SEO & performance optimization
cons: it lacks advanced third-party integrations and some features may feel restrictive for experienced developers who prefer full coding control.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Più che ottima. Facilità nell'utilizzo e nell'apprendimento nell'uso.
author: Guido P.
pros: La personalizzazione di ogni pagina web e la possibilità di aggiungere codice esterno html e css
cons: Ci dovrebbero essere ulteriori widget per includere custom design
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Dima V.
pros: Einfach zu bedienen und eine intuitive Benutzeroberfläche
cons: Seitenbreite schwer dargestellt, es ist manchmal schwierig die Seiten anzupassen
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Meine Erfahrung mit Sparkle war positiv, da die intuitive Benutzeroberfläche und die hilfreichen Funktionen es mir ermöglicht haben, meine Website schnell und einfach zu gestalten!
author: Mikhail K.
pros: Was mir an Sparkle am besten gefällt, ist die super einfache Benutzeroberfläche, die es mega leicht macht, coole PDFs und Designs schnell zu erstellen!
cons: die Benutzer müssen oft Designs für große Bildschirme und Smartphones separat erstellen
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Sehr gutes Produkt, ich würde es jederzeit wieder kaufen.
author: Til R.
pros: Das man es so einfach bedienen kann und alle Funktionen übersichtlich dargestellt bekommt.
cons: Das man manchmal wenige Funktionen vermisst. Der Support hilft einem jedoch schnell weiter!

author: Generoso P.
pros: Sparkle è semplicemente un'esperienza straordinaria per chiunque cerchi di portare la propria creatività a nuovi livelli. Con una vasta gamma di strumenti intuitivi e potenti, questo programma offre un ambiente stimolante e gratificante per esplorare e dare vita alle tue idee. Una delle caratteristiche più sorprendenti di Sparkle è la sua facilità d'uso. Anche se sei un principiante assoluto nel design, troverai l'interfaccia utente chiara e intuitiva, permettendoti di iniziare a creare immediatamente senza dover passare ore a imparare il programma.
cons: Alcune funzioni sono a pagamento, potrebbero fare un pacchetto che racchiuda il tutto........

description: Sparkle SEO optimization is a dream individual on page targeting so easy to implement
author: Seann Z.
pros: Sparkle website design is Fast in all areas, fast website loading, fast design of site, fast seo on page optimization.
cons: Sparkle has no Switchable theme design,

review_title: DER Editor für Leute die mit HTML nichts am Hut haben
author: Frank R.
pros: Besonders gefällt mir, dass die Seiten, wenn sie auf dem Server liegen und per Browser aufgerufen werden, genau so aussehen, wie während der Erstellung in Sparkle. Es verschiebt sich so gut wie nichts.
cons: Das man die Seiten quasi 2x gestalten muss, einmal für große Bildschirme und 1x für Smartphones im Hochformat.

review_title: Der beste Webeditor für den Mac kommt aus Italien
description: Ich kann meine eigenen Seiten und Projekte für mein Unternehmen schnell und einfach erstellen und pflegen.
author: Lennart F.
pros: Sparkle bietet eine kurze Einarbeitung und eine umfangreiche Dokumentation, die auch mit Videos angereichert werden. Es ist sehr einfach, neue Inhalte zur Seite hinzu zu fügen.Der Support von den Entwicklern ist Weltklasse, und einer der besten die ich je erfahren habe.
cons: Es könnten manchmal mehr dynamische Funktionen von Haus aus zur Verfügung stehen, so sind die Formularfunktionen zum Beispiel nicht sehr umfangreich .

description: Sparkle allows us to design and implement web sites knowing that they will be trouble free and not impacted by browser quirks. It's all built in
author: Euan W.
pros: Its WYSIWYG for web sites: You can concentrate on design and not the technologyIt's very reliable: no crashesAmazing support from the Sparkle team
cons: It would be nice to have accordion widgets

review_title: Die derzeit beste und intuitivste Software zur Erstellung von Websites auf dem Mac
description: Ich bin kein HTML5-Experte, mag aber auf der anderen Seite auch keine reinen Content-Manager oder starre Systeme wie Wordpress. Sparkle ist da perfekt: im Grunde muss man nur eine Vorstellung haben, wie die Seite aussehen soll und kann dies sehr intuitiv mit Sparkle verwirklichen.
author: Bernd B.
pros: Mir gefällt am besten das echte WYSIWYG und der schnelle und persönliche Kundensupport, der auch mit schnellen Beta-Versionen dienen kann
cons: Es gibt eigentlich nichts, was mir völlig missfällt. Luft nach oben ist natürlich immer.

review_title: Best Website Designing Software for Everyday Use
description: My overall experience with Sparkle has been a great one. I was able to learn to use Sparkle with few to no issues. I had been looking form a replacement for the old iWeb and found a better product with Sparkle.
author: Douglas S.
pros: What I like best about Sparkle is that it gets the job done without having to know deep down coding, etc. The learning curve is out of this world as it is so easy to learn and use in a short amount of time. The user forums are a very valuable tool to have and use as someone has most likely asked the same question and it has been answered. The online help is also out of this world and valuable.
cons: At this moment in time, I cannot think of anything that needs to be added to Sparkle to make it more useful.

review_title: Sparkle – Eine einsteigerfreundliche Software zum Erstellen kleiner Websites
description: Ich habe meine Portfolio Seite mit Sparkle erstellt.
author: Felix B.
pros: Sparkle ist eine einsteigerfreundliche Software, die dabei hilft ansprechende und benutzerfreundliche Websites zu erstellen. Was Sparkle von anderen ähnlichen Tools abhebt, ist die intuitive Benutzeroberfläche. Diese folgt dem WYSIWYG-Prinzip (What You See Is What You Get), was bedeutet, dass die bearbeitete Version auch gleichsam das endgültige Erscheinungsbild der Webseite ist. Es gibt einige Vorlagen, die einen schnellen Einstieg ermöglichen und man schnell zu ersten Ergebnissen kommt.
cons: Bei komplexen Webseiten ab ca 50 Unterseiten wird es schwierig über die Menüstruktur zu den einzelnen Sites zu navigieren.

author: Mehboob R.
pros: Sparkle software offers an artful web design experience. As a user, I appreciate the attention to detail and the visual appeal it brings to my projects.
cons: From a user standpoint, the support and documentation for Sparkle software could be more comprehensive. I encountered challenges finding solutions to specific issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: anton G.
pros: su facilidad de uso y las posibilidades que ofrece
cons: su precio es demasiado elevado para lo que ofrece
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Sitio bonito sin romperte la cabeza
description: La verdad, bastante bien. Si estás empezando o quieres algo rápido que se vea bien sin complicarte la vida, Sitely es muy buena opción. No es perfecta, pero cumple más que de sobra.
author: Elena T.
pros: Lo que más me gustó es que es súper fácil de usar. Literal, sin saber nada de diseño ni de webs, en una tarde ya tenía mi página montada. Todo es muy visual, arrastras cosas, escribes, cambias colores… y ya está. Las plantillas se ven profesionales y no parecen “de principiante”.
cons: Lo único que me rayó un poco fue que algunas opciones (como el SEO o conectar redes sociales) no están tan a la vista, me tocó buscarlas en tutoriales. Y si subes muchas imágenes grandes, a veces se nota un poco más lenta la carga de la web.
